ab: a ngadan ni kama ti Karuqu.
a ngadan ni kina ti Paules.
tucu a cavilj tapuluq anga ku cavilj.
macidilj a ku kaka a uqaljay a tjavulung, ti Qipu a ngadan nimadju, tapuluq katu ita a cavilj nimadju a tucu a cavilj.
ch: 我有一個哥哥，他叫Qipu，他今年11歲。
en: I have a brother, his name is Qipu, he is 11 years old.

ab: itua taytan a nia supusupuan a kakituluan.
ch: 我們在同一間學校讀書。
en: We study in the same school.

ab: tiaken kati kaka i Qipu tjengelay amen a semenay.
en: Both my brother and I like to sing.

ab: tjengelay aken a ljemanguy, nu i putideq a qadav, tiamen a tacemekeljan vayk amen a maciuciur a ljemanguy.
ch: 我喜歡游泳，放假的時候，我們全家會一起去游泳。
en: I like swimming. During the holidays, our whole family go swimming together.

ab: tjengelay aken a kisekeljangan tua adju, makaya amen a maciur a semenay kata ljemanguy.
ch: 我喜歡認識朋友，我們可以一起唱歌和游泳。
en: I love meeting new people, we can sing and swim together.
